title: I can't attach PDF documents
excerpt:
Good morning! 
I can’t attach a PDF to my board. 
Every time that I try It doesn’t allow me 
could you help me? 
Thanks

posts.author: Charlie92 (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning!

I can’t attach a PDF to my board.

Every time that I try It doesn’t allow me

could you help me?

Thanks

posts.author: Charlie92 (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it tell me that there is an error ( no number or nothing ) and the attach are cancelled

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: And where are you trying to attach from? Inside the item on the files tab or a specific column? How large is the pdf? Could it be too large?

posts.author: Charlie92 (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml:
It won’t let me upload the files in any column or in any conversation thread from the computer,

I find a temporal solution that it’s attach the file from Google Drive
